title: UVXY: Drifting Back to the 52-Week Floor
author: GabFromMars
selftext:
UVXY – Market Desk Note

UVXY stays heavy. Short-term tape soft, vols crushed on every uptick. Front VIX futures remain in contango, so carry bleed persists. No macro catalyst, no sustained hedging flow. Every pop gets sold.

Product drifting back toward the 52-week lows, consistent with the current volatility regime. Bias remains lower unless we get a shock event or a material shift in options demand. Bounces likely to be short-lived.

⸻

UVXY: Back in Bleed Mode
#UVXY #VIX #Volatility #MarketDesk #Macro #Options #Risk #Equities #Hedging #Contango #VolCrush
